title: Hide Unneeded Players
description: HidePlayers is a lightweight Fabric client mod that hides distant players and reduces collisions with simple commands.
body:
# Hide Unneeded Players

Hide Unneeded Players is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that helps reduce visual clutter from other players.

## Features

- **Toggle player hiding** with `/hideplayers` or `/hideplayers toggle`
- **Set a visible range** with `/hideplayers range <blocks>`
- **Keep nearby players visible** while hiding players farther away
- **Manage whitelist and blacklist entries**
- **Reduce client-side collisions** with hidden players

## Use Cases

This mod is useful for busy lobbies, crowded servers, events, or any situation where you want fewer unnecessary players on screen while still keeping important or nearby players visible.

## Commands

```text
/hideplayers
/hideplayers toggle
/hideplayers range <blocks>
/hideplayers whitelist add <player>
/hideplayers whitelist remove <player>
/hideplayers blacklist add <player>
/hideplayers blacklist remove <player>
/hideplayers collisions toggle
```

## For =>26.1
```text
H = Toggle Mod
C = Toggle Collisions
```
